match.userMessage:
Locked overhead camera holds steady on the lipstick resting on weathered driftwood. Gentle breeze lifts the sea grass slightly. Natural afternoon light shifts subtly across matte packaging and glossy bullet, casting soft moving shadows. Ocean horizon and pale sand remain softly blurred in background.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "Made for the water. Wear it everywhere."

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping shore, light coastal breeze.
